description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Phasar CI that runs on every push to master and development branches and on pull requests to these branches. Use an ubuntu-20.04 job with a matrix strategy to build Phasar with different compilers and build types. For each build configuration, checkout the repository, install Phasar and strategy dependencies, set up Swift 5.8.1, build Phasar with CMake and Ninja, and run unit tests.
